notes: Two corrections from the full application review (P0.1, P0.2), plus a backup hardening (P0.4): - The disclaimer's defined term now names OPEN TRADING SURFACE. The rename sweep had missed the all-caps defined term in the agreement's opening sentence — the single most load-bearing string in the terms. It now reads "BY DOWNLOADING, INSTALLING, OR USING OPEN TRADING SURFACE (ALSO 'OTS'; THE 'SOFTWARE', INCLUDING ANY VERSION OF THE SAME SOFTWARE PREVIOUSLY DISTRIBUTED UNDER A PRIOR NAME)…" — covering legacy installs without reproducing the retired mark.
